meta.defaultDescription: {{appName}} helps you discover local events around you on an interactive map.
meta.homeDescription: {{appName}} is the platform to discover local events near you. Explore an interactive map, find things to do, and follow organizers in your area.
meta.mapDescription: Explore {{appName}}'s interactive map to discover local events near you. Filter by date, venue, or category.
meta.userFallbackDescription: Discover events hosted by this organizer on {{appName}}
meta.eventDescriptionFallback: A local event to discover on {{appName}}

signin.title: Sign in | {{appName}}
signin.description: Sign in to {{appName}} to discover local events, manage your outings, and publish your own events.

register.title: Sign up | {{appName}}
register.description: Join {{appName}} to discover local events around you and publish your own events.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password | {{appName}}
forgotPassword.description: Reset your {{appName}} password. Enter your email address to receive a reset link.

resetPassword.title: Reset password | {{appName}}
resetPassword.description: Reset your {{appName}} password by entering your new password.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification | {{appName}}
verifyEmail.description: Verify your email address to activate your {{appName}} account.

acceptCgu.title: Accept Terms of Use | {{appName}}
acceptCgu.description: Accept the terms of use to complete your registration on {{appName}}.

resendVerification.title: Resend verification link | {{appName}}
resendVerification.description: Request a new verification link to activate your {{appName}} account.

checkEmail.title: Check your email | {{appName}}
checkEmail.description: Check your inbox to complete your registration on {{appName}}.

account.title: My account | {{appName}}
account.description: Manage your {{appName}} profile, events, venues, and settings.

accountCreate.title: Join {{appName}} | Publish and discover local events
accountCreate.description: Create your profile on {{appName}} to publish local events and reach new visitors.

accountSettings.title: Account settings | {{appName}}
accountSettings.description: Update your account settings, notification preferences, and personal information on {{appName}}.

accountUpdateCreator.title: Edit your profile | {{appName}}
accountUpdateCreator.description: Update your organizer profile and venue information on {{appName}}.

accountPlaceCreate.title: Create a venue | {{appName}}
accountPlaceCreate.description: Add your venue on {{appName}} to publish local events and make them visible on the map.

accountPlaceUpdate.title: Edit your venue | {{appName}}
accountPlaceUpdate.description: Update your venue information and events on {{appName}}.

accountEventCreate.title: Create an event | {{appName}}
accountEventCreate.description: Publish a local event on {{appName}} and attract visitors near you.

accountEventUpdate.title: Edit an event | {{appName}}
accountEventUpdate.description: Update your event details on {{appName}}: description, schedule, and visuals.

inbox.title: Messages | {{appName}}
inbox.description: Chat with organizers on {{appName}} to coordinate events and collaborations.

cgu.title: Terms of Use | {{appName}}
cgu.description: Read the terms of use for {{appName}}, a local events discovery platform.

home.subtitle: Discover what's happening near you
home.mapCardTitle: Explore local events on the map

guest.title: Do you organize events or manage a venue?
guest.description: Publish your local events and reach new visitors.

creator.title: Create events to attract visitors!
creator.description: Schedule your upcoming events and invite other organizers to join.

loggedOut.title: Create an account to access all {{appName}} features
loggedOut.description: {{appName}} helps you discover local events around you.

account.guestInfoLine1: Event organizer, venue manager, or event host?
account.guestInfoLine2: Publish your local events and join {{appName}} today.
account.guestInfoLine3: Click « Publish an event » to create your profile.
account.userTypeTitle: Choose the user type that best describes you.
account.userTypeCreator: An event organizer or host who wants to publish and promote local events.
account.userTypeOrganizer: A venue manager (market, shop, cultural space…) who hosts events.
